description_long: This is a modern two-story house set within a walled rectangular yard featuring a mix of brick and glass facades. The house has a distinctive angular roofline, with one section sloping and another flat, and includes a visible chimney. Large windows and a glass-enclosed sunroom or patio area are prominent on one side, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, landscaped with several trees and a well-maintained lawn. The rear of the house features a more private garden area, while the front is accessible via a gate and paved path. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern two-story brick and glass house with angular roofs, large windows, a garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, sloped roof, and two trees in the yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the glass sunroom/patio, large lawn, and back garden area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the angular roof, extensive windows, and a tree near the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with driveway, parked car, and a clear view of the garage and side entry.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass sunroom
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved path, no porch, and minimal overhang; integrated with garage access.
